member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Binning
member.summary: Services for Per Die Binning.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Binning.PrintBinsForAllActiveDieIds(Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Fetch and print current Bins for all active die ids.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Binning.SavePortInformation(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Int32},Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Assigns per die binning for the current die id.
member.param: Integer with exitPort for the current die ID.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder
member.summary: This class contains the high level services used for the CtvDecoding with an input file.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.SessionContext
member.summary: Gets or sets the session context.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.Debug
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the Debug mode is used or not.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.CsvDelimiter
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the CsvDelimiter defined.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.DataStructure
member.summary: Gets or sets a value of the DataStructure defined based in the ConfigurationFile.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.ConfigurationFile
member.summary: Gets or sets a value with the ConfigurationFile.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.CtvCapturePins
member.summary: Gets or sets a value with the CtvCapturePins.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.PlistName
member.summary: Gets or sets the PlistName to be used in the CtvDecoder class.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.SpmHelperStructure
member.summary: Gets or sets the SpmHelperStructure that contains an StringParsedMetadataHelper for each ItuffToken_ItuffDescriptor combo.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.CtvStructureInit(Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.File,Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedString,Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedString,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Function to initialize the data dictionary in the Verify Method.
member.param: The configuration file pointer.
ctvCapturePins as TestMethodParams.CommaSeparatedString.
List of strings to rename all CtvCapturePins.
List of integers to be used in conjunction with dieIdRenameParam to determine per SSID exit ports.

member.summary: Function to iterate over nested dictionaries. [Deprecated] - This function is preserved for backward compatibility, where CtvData can be received as strings, since the function is public it couldn't be removed to prevent from breaking user cude, it will be removed in next Major versio.
member.param: ctvCapturePins as TestMethodParams.CommaSeparatedString.
Dictionary containing CtvData as strings per pin.
Dictionary with Ituff data based on csv file ItuffTokens.
Dictionary with failing data to be printed in ituff.
member.returns: Result of CTV Processing.

member.summary: Function to iterate over nested dictionaries.
member.param: ctvCapturePins as TestMethodParams.CommaSeparatedString.
Dictionary containing CtvData per pin.
Dictionary with Ituff data based on csv file ItuffTokens.
Dictionary with failing data to be printed in ituff.
member.returns: Result of CTV Processing.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.GetFieldByPath(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Function to get a Field from DataStructure using relative paths.
member.param: The path of the field we want to return.
The absolute path as starting point reference.
member.returns: Returns the field fetched by path.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.GetFieldByPath(System.String)
member.summary: Function to get a Field from DataStructure using relative paths.
member.param: The path of the field we want to return.
member.returns: Returns the field fetched by path.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.DictionaryUpdate(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Function that updates the pivot dictionary with the update dictionary data.
member.param: The pivot dictionary we want to update.
Dictionary with the updated data. Appends if common key exists, otherwise adds an item to pivot.
member.returns: Returns the updated pivot dictionary.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.DictionaryTree(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Field)
member.summary: Function that creates a flat dictionary with a Field on tail. This structure is needed to be merged properly.
member.param: List of rungs in field hierarchy.
The field object.
member.returns: Returns the flat dictionary.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.DictionaryMerge(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Int32)
member.summary: Recursive function that merges the dictionaries.
member.param: The original pivot dictionary.
The dictionary we want to merge to the pivot dictionary. Has a flat dictionary structure.
Configuration File row index for the current iterating field.
member.returns: Returns the new pivot dictionary with the merged dictionary.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.SetCompareDataValues(Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Field)
member.summary: Function set the limits and/or expected value from the string within input Field Parameters.
member.param: The field with the data (limits and expected value) expressions.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.GetPackageExitPort
member.summary: Function to pick an exit port based on ascending priority.
member.returns: Returns the final package exit port.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.SetDieIdRenameFromParameters(Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedString,Prime.TestMethods.TestMethodsParams.CommaSeparatedString)
member.summary: Function that validates and sets the dieIdRenameParam list from TestMethod parameters.
member.param: dieIdRenameParam from TestMethod parameters.
ctvCapturePins defined in the TestMethod parameters.

member.summary: Function to iterate over nested dictionaries.
member.param: The Ctv Pin to be processed.
String containing the ctv data to be processed.
Dictionary with Ituff data based on csv file ItuffTokens.
Dictionary with failing data to be printed in ituff.
member.returns: Returns the exit port for current iteration (dieId).

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.GetDieIdRename(System.String)
member.summary: Function that renames from pin name to die name.
member.param: The pin name.
member.returns: Returns the die name.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.SetFunctionResult(Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Field)
member.summary: Function set the stringExpression to numbers from the string with field paths.
member.param: The field with the stringExpression.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.FunctionExpression(Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Field,System.String)
member.summary: Function to process an stringExpression expression.
member.param: The Field being processed.
The functionExpression to be processed.
member.returns: Returns the value from functionExpression result.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.CheckSameDomainPinsDataSizesAreEqual
member.summary: Function to check for the expected size of each CtvCapture pin based in the ConfigurationFile match among them.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.ReplaceThisWithFieldName(System.String,Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Field)
member.summary: Function to replace the keyword 'this' with the current FieldName.
member.param: The current field named as "this".
The current Field Object.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.ReplaceFieldPathInStringExpression(Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Field,System.String)
member.summary: Function to replace a field Path in a string expression with its FieldData.
member.param: The current Field Object.
A fieldPath from original stringExpression. Could contain "this" if it is referring to the current Field.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.PrintDebug(System.String)
member.summary: Function to print debug messages in console.
member.param: The message to be printed.

member.summary: Function to SetDebugMode based on Instance LogLevel.

member.summary: Function to BuildDebugTableHeader string.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.BasicConfigurationFileValidation
member.summary: Function to validate the ConfigurationFile basic healthiness.
member.returns: Returns the ConfigurationFile content as a string array.

member.summary: Function to set the ConfigurationFile basic parameters as the CsvDelimiter, Header, and number of Columns.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.InitializeBasicAttributes
member.summary: Function to Initialize the basic attributes as the structures to hold all the ConfigurationFile data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.CheckPinNames
member.summary: Function to checks the CtvCapture pins comparing them with the ones found in in the ConfigurationFile.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.BuildStringParsedMetadataHelper
member.summary: Function to build the StringParsedMetadataHelper structure based on the ConfigurationFile's Field and ITUFF Descriptor columns.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.SplitRowDataAndCheckElements(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Function to split and check the row data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.UpdatePinSizeStructure(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Function to update the perCtvCapturePinStringSize structure for final checkout of sizes between the different pins.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.CtvDecoder.DataStructureInitialization(System.String[])
member.summary: Function to iterate thru each ConfigurationFile's row.
Function to iterate thru each ConfigurationFile's column for the given row.

member.summary: Function to initialize the DataStructure based on the ConfigurationFile.

member.summary: Function to check if any column name is repeated.

member.summary: Function to check if size of tname is bigger than 128 characters.

member.summary: Function to initialize the DataStructure based on the ConfigurationFile.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.DieIdFormatChecker
member.summary: This class is intended to store all utils and common functions.

member.summary: Check if the value is a DieId Code.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.DieIdFormatChecker.CheckDieIdFormat(System.String)
member.summary: Checks the DieId string format.
member.param: token of holding the string token to verified.
member.returns: Returns a true if the format matches a DieId.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Field
member.summary: This class contains the basic structure of a Field.
Initializes a new instance of the class. Constructor for the Field class.
member.param: The field's name.
The parameters for each field .
The hierarchy levels of the field.
The hierarchy levels in dictionary format.
The ConfigurationFile row where the Field is locates.
The session context of this operation.

member.summary: Gets the MaxSize of a Field in terms of bits.

member.summary: Gets or sets the LowLimit parameter of a Field.

member.summary: Gets or sets the HighLimit parameter of a Field.

member.summary: Gets or sets the Function parameter of a Field.

member.summary: Gets or sets the LowLimit parameter of a Field.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Field.HighLimitValueString
member.summary: Gets or sets the HighLimit parameter of a Field.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Field.StringData
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether gets or sets the StringData of a Field.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Field.FieldStringData
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether gets or sets the FieldStringData of a Field.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Field.FieldData
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether gets or sets the decimal Data of a Field.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Field.Size
member.summary: Gets or sets the Size of a Field.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Field.Base
member.summary: Gets or sets base number to convert a decoded value from binary to decimal or hex. Valid values are 2, 10 and 16. Default is 2.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Field.InstanceExitPort
member.summary: Gets or sets the InstanceExitPort at which the test will exit the instance.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Field.ExitPort
member.summary: Gets or sets the user defined ExitPort at which the test will exit the instance.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Field.ItuffToken
member.summary: Gets or sets the ITUFF Token number of a field.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Field.PinFinderFormat
member.summary: Gets or sets the PinFinderFormat string.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Field.PerBit
member.summary: Gets or sets the PerBit parameter of a Field.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Field.Codification
member.summary: Gets or sets the codification type for the field.

member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether a field size exceeds the maxSize.

member.summary: Function that formats a Field parameter based on its name and returns is string double representation with 4 decimal digits.

member.returns: Returns the Field Data in the requested base.

member.returns: Returns the Field Data in the requested codification.

member.returns: Returns the updated string with decimal numbers.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.ICtvDecoderExtensions.CustomPostProcessDcResults(Prime.BusinessLogic.Dc.IDcResult)
member.summary: Called right after successful execution to provide the user the ability to post process exit port, CTV results, and DC results.
member.param: The object for holding the exit port, CTV results, and DC results.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.ItuffFormat
member.summary: This class is intended to store all Ituff Printing functions.

member.summary: Gets the ItuffDelimiter used for printing in Ituff.
Function that prints a dictionary in ituff format.
member.param: The local database to print to ituff.
The spmHelperStructure containing predefined StringParsedMetadata objects.
The session context of this operation.

member.summary: Prints the PerBitFailures to Ituff.
member.param: Field object containing the failing information for pin finder printout.
Bit to be printed in PinFinderFormat.
The session context of this operation.

member.returns: Returns the dieIdtoken.

member.summary: Function to append data into the ItuffDataDictionary.

member.returns: Returns the DieIdDataDictionary contained in ituffDatabase if exists.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.PrimeCtvDecoderTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IApplyEndSequenceParameter#ApplyEndSequence
member.summary: Gets or sets the ApplyEndSequence at the end of the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.PrimeCtvDecoderTestMethod.Prime#TestMethods#CommonParams#IPrePlistCommonParam#PrePlist
member.summary: Gets or sets the PrePlist callback to plist execution.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.PrimeCtvDecoderTestMethod.MaskPins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated pins for mask.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.PrimeCtvDecoderTestMethod.Pins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated pins to get DC results for.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.PrimeCtvDecoderTestMethod.LowLimits
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated low limits for the measure pins.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.PrimeCtvDecoderTestMethod.HighLimits
member.summary: Gets or sets comma seperated high limits for the measure pins.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.PrimeCtvDecoderTestMethod.DatalogLevel
member.summary: Gets or sets datalog level(ALL, FAIL_ONLY, COMPRESS, PINMAP_COMPRESS").

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.PrimeCtvDecoderTestMethod.TriggerMapName
member.summary: Gets or sets comma seperated high limits for the measure pins.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.PrimeCtvDecoderTestMethod.SoftwareTriggerConfiguration
member.summary: Gets or sets the configuration file for the software trigger event.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.PrimeCtvDecoderTestMethod.SamplingCount
member.summary: Gets or sets sampling count per pin. Optional field , Required when measuring the same pin few times.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.PrimeCtvDecoderTestMethod.MeasurementTypes
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated measurement types (Current, Voltage) or (C, V).

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.PrimeCtvDecoderTestMethod.CtvCapturePins
member.summary: Gets or sets comma separated pins for CTV capture.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.PrimeCtvDecoderTestMethod.ConfigurationFile
member.summary: Gets or sets ConfigFile with dataStructure parameters.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.PrimeCtvDecoderTestMethod.DieIdRename
member.summary: Gets or sets the DieIdRename.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.PrimeCtvDecoderTestMethod.PerDieBinning
member.summary: Gets or sets the PerDieBinning.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.PrimeCtvDecoderTestMethod.Decoder
member.summary: Gets or sets the CtvDecoder.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.PrimeCtvDecoderTestMethod.ExitPort
member.summary: Gets or sets the custom port to be overriden by user..

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.PrimeCtvDecoderTestMethod.Bootstrapper
member.summary: Bootstrapper.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Utils
member.summary: This class is intended to store all utils and common functions.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Utils.PrintDebug(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Function to print debug messages in console.
member.param: The message to be printed.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Utils.PrintDebugError(System.String,Prime.SessionService.ISessionContextProviderContainer)
member.summary: Function to print error messages in console.
member.param: The string to be reversed.
The session context of this operation.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Utils.SliceString(System.Text.StringBuilder,System.Int32)
member.summary: Function to Slice a string in two parts based on the sliceSize.
member.param: The string to be sliced.
The size of the slice to be cut.
member.returns: Returns a StringBuilder with the sliced data.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Utils.ReplaceFirst(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Function to Replace first appearance in string.
member.param: The string where the replace happens.
String to be replaced.
Replaces the searched string.
member.returns: Returns the string with the replacement done.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Utils.OnesComplementToDecimal(System.String)
member.summary: Function to calculate OnesComplement.
member.param: The string to be reversed from OnesComplement.
member.returns: Returns the int value of the 1's complement input binary string.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Utils.TwosComplementToDecimal(System.String)
member.summary: Function to calculate TwosComplement.
member.param: The string to be converted to TwosComplement.
member.returns: Returns the 2's complement of the input binary string.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Utils.Reverse(System.String)
member.summary: Function to reverse a string.
member.param: The string to be reversed.
member.returns: Returns the reversed string.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.CtvDecoder.Utils.BaseStringReplace(System.String)
member.summary: Function to parse based values (hex, oct, bin) to decimal numbers in string format.
member.param: The string that contains the based (0x, 0o, 0b) values.
member.returns: Returns the updated string with decimal numbers.
